summary: Verified ~237+ structured path references (scripts .cjs/.ts/.py/.sh, assets .json/.yaml/.tmpl/.jsonc, references/*.md, cross-skill ../ paths) across all 15 SKILL.md files in cli-*, mcp-*, deep-*, system-* skills. Every path resolved to an existing file on disk under at least one of the two valid resolution bases (source skill directory or repo root). Zero broken, zero wrong-slug, zero #133-caused. The de-numbering migration (#133) only touched per-feature snippet filenames that none of the skill SKILL.md structured paths reference.
